title: Tiffany Lastimosa Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Tiffany Lastimosa Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Tiffany Lastimosa
Align Student
MS in Computer Science ’22
Seattle Campus
After seven years as a paralegal, Tiffany Lastimosa became frustrated with her company’s inefficient system for processing data. Taking the initiative to improve it, she came across the Align program and has come a long way since then.
I don’t have a background in any STEM field, so trying to tackle computer science, I was definitely nervous. I wasn’t sure what the future might look like for me, but the Align program was super helpful
Tiffany Lastimosa, Align MSCS ’22
Explore all Khoury Stories
